case_number: Constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2293 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 30-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. On 08-09-2025, the following order passed;- “None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. This Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 18.09.2025. Issue intimation notice to Counsel for the Petitioner for the next date.” Whereafter on 18-09-2025 Mr. Ghazanfar Abbas Jatoi, Advocate appeared and filed vakalatnama on behalf of the Petitioner and sought time. Once again on 09-10-2025, the petitioner was present in person and sought time to bring his Counsel; hence the matter was adjourned for today. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest to pursue the matter though the matter is pending without any useful progress. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
